title: Guwahati、Assam — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Guwahati、Assam的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Guwahati是Assam的一个城市，人口约1,200,000。The largest city in Northeast India, a gateway to the Seven Sister states, known for its temples, wildlife, and Brahmaputra River.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
